The current monitoring plan computes PSI weekly for key numerical and categorical features (replacing the original plan that only checked model accuracy once per month).
The original monitoring plan only checked model accuracy, doing so once per month.

PSI was added so the monitoring plan could track drift in the key numerical and categorical features—computing PSI each week to flag significant changes and, if the PSI exceeds the alert threshold, trigger model retraining.
Retraining should be triggered when the PSI crosses the alert threshold for two consecutive checks.
